title: Thelypteris nephrolepioides

Thelypteris nephrolepioides is further classified as belonging to the division Pteridophyta, which includes all ferns and their allies. The species is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Thelypteris nephrolepioides is often classified as an epiphytic fern, meaning it grows on other plants.
